name: TowerUp: Breakout
short_description: What do you get when you mix FPS, Roguelike, Parkour, and... robots that want to destroy you? TowerUp!
detailed_description:
What do you get when you mix FPS, Roguelike, Parkour, and... robots that want to destroy you? TowerUp!


In the main mode, you’re a robot (yes, another robot... but this one has attitude and an endless supply of bad jokes). Your "dream job"? Escaping from a magic portal, navigating through rooms filled with traps and robots that only exist to mess with you. The cherry on top? Every time you die (and oh, you’ll die a lot), you earn money and upgrades. Because, let’s face it, dying should have some perks, right?




Game modes:

  • TowerUp: The main adventure where you fight robots, explore a procedurally generated complex filled with enemies, and try to take down the company that, surprise, created you. Easy peasy... or not.

  • Duelo: Because nothing says "friendship" like challenging your buddy to a 1v1 and rubbing those kills in their face.

  • Arena: Like Duelo, but now with teams of up to 5 robots, ready to see who can wreak the most havoc in a massive map.




But believe me, TowerUp isn’t just about how many times you’ll die. It’s also about moving with style: parkour, insane jumps, and that sweet, sweet feeling of gliding over enemy robots while pulling off some cinematic shots.



Features:

  • Singleplayer, Multiplayer, and modes that will test your patience and reflexes.

  • A power-up system that makes the chaos even more fun.

  • Ultra-dynamic movement – because walking in a straight line is for chumps.

  • Lots of robots... but you’re the robot with guns and a dream of destruction!



TowerUp: be the robot everyone wants to see blow the place up!

supported_languages:
English, French, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil*, Russian
*languages with full audio support
